channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Netanyahu responds to Vance's assertion that US is Israel's only powerful ally
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Sunday pushed back against Vice President JD Vance's implied warning that the US is Israel's sole...

item.title: Interior Secretary Doug Burgum says vandals caused 'multiple gashes' to Reflecting Pool liner
item.description: Interior Secretary Doug Burgum reported Sunday that vandals inflicted several cuts to the industrial liner of the newly renovated Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.

item.title: Josh Shapiro says socialist primary wins reflect ideological battle, compares Trump to 'a king'
item.description: Pennsylvania Governor Josh Shapiro stated Sunday that the election of socialists in Democratic primaries will spark a party debate on core beliefs, and he likened Donald Trump to a monarch.

item.title: Teaching Students to Love America Again
item.description: Students inherit the nation's accomplishments and bear the responsibility of preserving its great civilization.
